title: lepidium altissimum
intro: Lepidium altissimum, also known as tall peppercress, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepidium altissimum are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Lepidium altissimum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
